description: Search C# symbols (classes, methods, properties, fields, ...) across the workspace by name using Roslyn. Fuzzy/camel-hump matching is supported (e.g. 'ACECSO' matches 'AudioCueEventChannelSO'). More precise than grep for locating a declaration by name when you do not know its file; follow up with code_find_references / code_goto_definition for deeper navigation.

query.description: Symbol name or fragment to search for (case-insensitive, fuzzy).

max_results.description: Maximum number of symbols to return. Default 50.
